enterpriseFeature.title: Enterprise Feature
enterpriseFeature.description: {{feature}} require Enterprise Edition. Please upgrade to access this feature.

settings.title: Extension Management
settings.description: Install, configure, and manage extensions to extend Alga PSA functionality.

enterpriseOnly.title: Enterprise feature
enterpriseOnly.description: Extensions are available in the Enterprise edition of Alga PSA.

links.debugConsole: Open Service Proxy Demo Debug Console

settings.heading: Extension Settings
settings.notFoundDescription: The extension you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
settings.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to their default values?
settings.cardDescription: Configure settings for this extension. These settings will be used by the extension to customize its behavior.
settings.noConfigurable: This extension doesn't have any configurable settings.

customConfig.title: Custom Configuration
customConfig.description: Add custom configuration values for this extension. These are provided to the extension alongside the settings defined above.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.description: Configure scheduled tasks for this extension by invoking a manifest-declared API endpoint on a cron schedule. On extension updates, schedules are remapped by endpoint method/path; updates may be blocked if a scheduled endpoint is removed.
schedules.noEndpoints: This extension does not declare any API endpoints, so there is nothing to schedule.
schedules.payloadHelp: For GET endpoints, payload is ignored. For POST endpoints, payload becomes the request body. Avoid including secrets in payloads; use the extension's config/secrets instead.

secrets.title: Secret Values
secrets.descriptionHasStored: Leave a field blank to keep the existing secret.
secrets.descriptionNoStored: Provide values for required secrets before saving.
secrets.storedHint: Stored secret present. Enter a new value to rotate.

communityEdition.listUnavailable: Extensions not available in this edition

communityEdition.dynamicInstallUnavailable: Extension installation not available in Community Edition

page.title: Extensions
page.description: Extensions management is available in Enterprise Edition.

runtime.loadError: Failed to load extension runtime info
runtime.bundleUnavailableDescription: The extension bundle is missing or has not been uploaded.
runtime.runtimeDomainUnavailableDescription: Reprovision the extension from Settings -> Extensions -> select extension -> Provision.

installer.title: Install Extension
installer.description: Choose a signed bundle and install it.
installer.bundleHint: The manifest will be extracted automatically from the bundle.
installer.customManifestPlaceholder: Leave empty to use manifest from bundle, or paste custom manifest.json here
installer.manifestExtractFailed: Could not extract manifest from bundle. Please provide it manually.
installer.uploadNoKey: Upload succeeded but no key was returned
installer.manifestMissing: Could not extract valid manifest from bundle.
installer.installCompleteError: Extension finalized, but install did not complete
installer.finalizeRequireManifest: Please paste the manifest JSON before finalizing.
installer.finalizeProvidedFailed: Failed to finalize with provided manifest
